name: mike-henke-website
description: Personal portfolio website built with Eleventy, featuring blog functionality and search powered by Pagefind

scripts.dev: node scripts/extract-wordpress-posts.mjs && npm run clean && cross-env NODE_ENV=development npx @11ty/eleventy --serve --watch
scripts.dev:search: npm run build:dev && npx pagefind --site _site --verbose && npx @11ty/eleventy --serve --watch
scripts.build: npm run clean && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npx @11ty/eleventy && npm run search:index
scripts.build:dev: node scripts/extract-wordpress-posts.mjs && npm run clean && cross-env NODE_ENV=development npx @11ty/eleventy
scripts.build:production: node scripts/extract-wordpress-posts.mjs && npm run clean && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npx @11ty/eleventy
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run format:check
scripts.deploy: npm run build && echo 'Add deployment commands'

author: Mike Henke
